programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Benny and Hoot turn 2Much and Delisha's simple argument over who knocked over a tower of juice boxes into the trial of the century. / Penny accidentally takes Jerome's favorite stuffy Anastasia.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.sub-title: The Dark Prince Returns! Devastate Belfyre!
programme.desc: Bel faces off with Ranzo to test his new Bey and wins; Rashad abandons his Saviour Valkyrie and creates his own unique Quad System Beyblade.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: hey might have lost the title match, but Team Persona still has their sights set on the top of The X. And while Robin and Jaxon are complacent, Multi's got a plan to get to the top once again.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Zac looks for a job. Autumn uses her prosthetic. Liann tries to figure out who Ley-La is. Olly pushes Paisley, and Zac encourages her to speak up.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: When Skipper snags her first babysitting job, overprotective Barbie goes overboard trying to make sure everything runs smoothly.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! The Oracles are the target audience in Sell Out, but can they pay the Overseer from talking about musicals?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Logan and Astrid face their fears in the Dream Forge while Mateo, Zoey, and Z-Blob seek out the Gnorfs to destroy the Eye of Confusion.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran hosts a tea party for Maggie and her friends in order to make Maggie fit in, but Maxwell is worried that Fran's lack of class may ruin the sophisticated party.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and Maggie end up fighting after Maggie's boyfriend gets interested in Fran.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While juggling his Indian clubs Gomez accidentally hits his head and his personality drastically changes.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez conducts an investigation - with all members of the household under suspicion.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara's boyfriend Ockie has an English castle that is haunted by a most disagreeable ghost. Samantha goes to England to help him and runs into her vacationing in-laws.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: When artificial grass is mistakenly installed on the Stevens' lawn, Darrin thinks that it is Samantha's doing and tells her to get rid of it.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces four inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story. He allows people to tell their own stories first-hand, to say, \.

programme.title: Jeopardy! Australia
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts legendary quiz show Jeopardy! Featuring Australian contestants, players guess the questions to the answers given. The winner gets to claim the title and keep the prize money.

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: It's the third semifinal and the last chance to qualify for the Grand Final. With dual racing action across awe-inspiring obstacles, the Newcomers, Legends and Teens battle it out in a race to make the Grand Final.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran hosts a tea party for Maggie and her friends in order to make Maggie fit in, but Maxwell is worried that Fran's lack of class may ruin the sophisticated party.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and Maggie end up fighting after Maggie's boyfriend gets interested in Fran.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping with Jerry, Elaine spots an old bike just like the one she had as a girl. But when Jerry is distracted by another customer and won't help her get it down, Elaine injures her neck.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After returning home from a lucrative out-of-town engagement, Jerry decides to buy his father a new Cadillac. As Jerry is out looking for the car, a friend of Elaine's claims George is just the right type for her friend, Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: To Twitch or Not to Twitch
programme.desc: In an argument about witchcraft after they get a flat tire, Samantha takes Tabitha and leaves.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: On a play-date scheduled by Darrin's mother, Tabitha's playmate wishes that he was a dog and Tabitha grants his wish.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: After CC tries to bond with the children, Gracie runs away to Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: The Butler, the Husband, the Wife and Her Mother
programme.desc: Niles has to pose as Fran's husband when her relatives come to visit.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer continues to play with the cable guy. George's obsession with Marisa makes Susan suspicious and Elaine calls Jerry in Florida and tells him she wants to come and join him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George works on his parent's move, the tenants in Jerry's building get new shower heads. But when Kramer's plea for a good place to shower sounds suspiciously like a drug deal to her boss, Elaine is fired.

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Disgruntled Korean War vet Walt Kowalski sets out to reform his neighbour, a young Asian teenager who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession, his 1972 Gran Torino.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer continues to play with the cable guy. George's obsession with Marisa makes Susan suspicious and Elaine calls Jerry in Florida and tells him she wants to come and join him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George works on his parent's move, the tenants in Jerry's building get new shower heads. But when Kramer's plea for a good place to shower sounds suspiciously like a drug deal to her boss, Elaine is fired.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the eve of the final and excitement in the Villa is hitting fever pitch, our Islanders have all experienced a summer they'll never forget, and the end is now just a day away.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: Jeopardy! Australia
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts legendary quiz show Jeopardy! Featuring Australian contestants, players guess the questions to the answers given. The winner gets to claim the title and keep the prize money.

programme.title: 9honey - He Said, She Said
programme.desc: He Said She Said sees Ben and Shelly debate each other on a variety of issues. An often hilarious and at times serious examination of what everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: When Skipper snags her first babysitting job, overprotective Barbie goes overboard trying to make sure everything runs smoothly.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Barney shows the kids that small things can affect big change! / Silly chaos ensues when the kids can't agree on what game to play and Barney has a hard time keeping up with all the different games.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Logan and Astrid face their fears in the Dream Forge while Mateo, Zoey, and Z-Blob seek out the Gnorfs to destroy the Eye of Confusion.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Penny's friendship with Earl is put in jeopardy when Lonny accuses Penny of lacking maturity. / Lonny has a fight with Alfred and Ronny and decides to move in with Hop and Penny.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: When Bel challenges Rashad, Wakiya proposes a team battle - with Bel, Ranzo and Valt facing off against Rashad, Bashara, and Ilya.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Nine Kurosu, a member of the Kurosu Clan, suddenly appears at Komaba Sushi and tells Persona that X City will be destroyed unless the clan is defeated.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.sub-title: Ley-La, Rise of a Music Star
programme.desc: Olly feels pressure. Paisley asks Zac for dance help. Aliya and Liann pose as reporters and find a key clue about Ley-La's identity: her guitar pick.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie and her friends take a road trip to hear Daisy drop the beat at a major music festival, but Daisy keeps finding reasons to stall along the way.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Our players have been cast as half-time entertainment. Will they go down as the best of the best or a babbling mess?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the Never Witch sets her sights on the Grim Realm, the dream chasers must team up with the Nightmare King and grimspawn to stop her.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: After CC tries to bond with the children, Gracie runs away to Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: The Butler, the Husband, the Wife and Her Mother
programme.desc: Niles has to pose as Fran's husband when her relatives come to visit.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: To Twitch or Not to Twitch
programme.desc: In an argument about witchcraft after they get a flat tire, Samantha takes Tabitha and leaves.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: On a play-date scheduled by Darrin's mother, Tabitha's playmate wishes that he was a dog and Tabitha grants his wish.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Tonight on Australian Ninja Warrior is the Stage One of the Grand Final. For the first time ever, Ninjas will not only have to race the clock, but also their fellow Ninjas to progress to Grand Final Stage Two.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: After CC tries to bond with the children, Gracie runs away to Fran's parents' house.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: The Butler, the Husband, the Wife and Her Mother
programme.desc: Niles has to pose as Fran's husband when her relatives come to visit.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer continues to play with the cable guy. George's obsession with Marisa makes Susan suspicious and Elaine calls Jerry in Florida and tells him she wants to come and join him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George works on his parent's move, the tenants in Jerry's building get new shower heads. But when Kramer's plea for a good place to shower sounds suspiciously like a drug deal to her boss, Elaine is fired.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.sub-title: The Addams Family and the Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Larry asks Sam to help him with a client to modernise his firm.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: After Darrin, in a fit of frustration, says that they should tell everyone about Sam being a witch, she makes him dream about that very situation and the reactions of their friends and the US government.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently eats Grace's imaginary friend Imogene.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and the kids prepare to celebrate Christmas alone when Maxwell and CC have to go on a business trip.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: In the ocean's darkest depths, researchers fight for survival against massive prehistoric sea creatures and an equally predatory mining operation.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While George is disturbed by a doll that looks like his mum, his dad searches for a long-lost cousin in Italy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Following the unexpected postponement of their wedding, George badgers Susan for permission to set up Jerry with her maid of honour, Hallie.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Tonight we join host Maya Jama as this season of Love Island UK comes to an exciting close. Relive all the highs and lows of the Villa, before our winning couple is revealed.

programme.title: It Only Takes a Night
programme.desc: Four best friends on a girl's night out end up on a path none of them expected and find out it really does only take one night to change your life.

programme.title: Cards and Collectables Australia
programme.desc: We visit a LEGO room where EVERYTHING is awesome. An incredible NRL card collection in a former Prime Minister's holiday home and we explain how the internet changed the hobby forever.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie and her friends take a road trip to hear Daisy drop the beat at a major music festival, but Daisy keeps finding reasons to stall along the way.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Mel breaks her arm and is away from the park. Her friends do something nice to show how much they missed her; an imaginative game encourages her to embrace her recently-broken arm.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When the Never Witch sets her sights on the Grim Realm, the dream chasers must team up with the Nightmare King and grimspawn to stop her.
